## Checklist
- [ ] Code has version header comment (vX.X.X) incremented from last version
- [ ] All existing functionality still works — nothing broken
- [ ] Follows design system (colors, typography, spacing)
- [ ] Accessibility compliant:
  - [ ] Color contrast 4.5:1 minimum
  - [ ] Focus rings visible on all interactive elements
  - [ ] Keyboard navigable
  - [ ] Proper ARIA labels
  - [ ] Semantic HTML
- [ ] Mobile responsive (tested at 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px)
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Tested on Vercel preview deployment
